UserService/src/main/java/com/broker/use.general_idea: Change the userId field type from primitive long to wrapper Long to align with JPA best practices and avoid null-handling issues.
Enable Spring Cloud Discovery Client for service registration and discovery.
Migrate from deprecated HttpSecurity.csrf() lambda to csrf() lambda DSL (syntax alignment).
UserService/src/main/java/com/broker/use.why_exists: While the lambda syntax .csrf(csrf -> csrf.disable()) is valid in newer versions, the migration context implies ensuring compatibility with the new DSL structure where older fluent methods might be deprecated or behave differently in strict mode.

UserService/src/main/resources/applicati.general_idea: Update database connection URL to use Docker service name instead of localhost.
Add Eureka client configuration for service discovery.
UserService/src/main/resources/applicati.after:
eureka:
  client:
    service-url:
      defaultZone: http://localhost:8761/eureka/
    fetch-registry: true
    register-with-eureka: true
  instance:
    prefer-ip-address: true
    lease-renewal-interval-in-seconds: 10
    lease-expiration-duration-in-seconds: 30
    metadata-map:
      instanceId: ${spring.application.name}:${spring.application.instance-id:${random.value}}
